description: 9-commit auto-only rollup since prior poll (2026-04-28T11:37:29Z → 2026-04-28T23:09:46Z, ~11.54h span). 7x 'Auto-update ECM status' (the 5-min monitor.py cron — touches docs/data/latest_hash.txt, docs/data/status_history.json, latest_hash.txt, monitor_log.txt, status_history.json with +747/-0 status_history append per commit). 2x 'auto: ECM data pull' (pull_data.py — touches docs/data/live_data.json + docs/tracking.html, only changing live-status timestamp + Tomsk Schumann amplitude reading + similar live monitoring values; no schema change). 0x 'auto: daily AI review' (8th regen still pending until ~07:41Z 2026-04-29). 0 manual commits — 20 consecutive polls of auto-only commits. 0 source-file touches (monitor.py, pull_data.py, build_daily_review.py, inject_ai_layer.py, verify_predictions.py, generate_manifest.js all untouched).
before: Prior baseline: 19 consecutive polls of auto-only commits; last manual a57e731 at 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z; drought 10.98d / 263.5h.
after: 20 consecutive polls of auto-only commits; same last manual a57e731 at 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z; drought 11.46d / 275.12h. 9 commits in window (split: 7 status, 2 data-pull, 0 daily-review, 0 manual, 0 source-touch).
